GET /health.description: AI service health check — returns status and service name

POST /generate/.description: Generate production-grade code using OpenRouter LLM for a given problem

POST /quiz/generate.description: Generate comprehension quiz with multiple-choice questions from code and annotations

POST /diff/.description: Score user rebuild against original solution using AST-based diff engine

POST /defend/respond.description: Socratic questioning or evaluation for defend sessions via OpenRouter LLM

GET /health (api).description: API backend health check — returns status, service name, and timestamp

GET /trpc (api).description: tRPC middleware endpoint for type-safe RPC between frontend and backend

POST /trpc (api).description: tRPC middleware endpoint for type-safe RPC mutations
